## Check Active Directory Break Glass Account Readiness

Runs 13 survivability checks on designated break-glass accounts to assess emergency readiness and generates a weighted score out of 100% for each account.

![](data:image/png;base64,)

### _Sample Output:_

The exported Active Directory break-glass account readiness report is shown below.

![](data:image/png;base64,)

## Active Directory Management tool by AdminDroid

Gain full control of your Active Directory environment with the [AdminDroid Active Directory management tool](https://admindroid.com/active-directory-all-in-one-tool?src=GitHub). It offers 450+ reports, 60+ management actions, deep-dive auditing, advanced alerts, and automated workflows to streamline AD administration.
